judge.rationale: The design correctly identifies all three domains (projects, tasks, notifications) and all four critical ports. Port interfaces are well-typed with discriminated unions and no `any` types. Documentation explicitly names owner/consumer relationships and purpose for each port. The design demonstrates surface-first thinking by presenting ports as the primary deliverable before describing architecture and composition. Minor deduction on PORT_QUALITY: ProjectLookupPort includes both `projectExists()` and `getProject()` when the reference design achieves the same goal with just `exists(id)`, trading minimalism for convenience—acceptable but not maximally restrained.
